must_detect.matched_text:
Staff onboarding: Employee Onboarding Form VN-OB/2026 requires only minimal fields (name, role, work email), and optional fields (personal bank alias) are suppressed unless payroll is selected.
Cross-border transfers: no new exports this quarter; the last approved export (Form VN-CBT/2025-011) sent masked payroll data to a processor in Singapore under DPA Schedule 2 (Vietnam), with a transfer impact assessment and Decree 13 record filed
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.matched_text: Cross-border transfers: no new exports this quarter
must_not_detect.reason: Negated event; not a live cross-border transfer marker

must_not_detect.matched_text: the last approved export (Form VN-CBT/2025-011) sent masked payroll data to a processor in Singapore
must_not_detect.reason: Completed historical cross-border transfer; not a live privacy event

must_not_detect.matched_text: to date this quarter no consent withdrawals have been recorded
must_not_detect.reason: Negated consent-withdrawal; avoid false positive for consent_withdrawal_marker

must_not_detect.matched_text: there are no open requests at present
must_not_detect.reason: Negated DSAR status; not a live DSAR risk
Completed erasure; not a live deletion request

must_not_detect.matched_text: does not collect passport numbers for interns
must_not_detect.reason: Negated collection; avoid treating as present passport_number
Illustrative masked placeholder; not a real bank account
Explicitly stated as placeholder ticker; avoid MNPI/ticker detection

must_not_detect.matched_text: no unpublished issuer information with price impact is discussed herein
must_not_detect.reason: Negated MNPI statement; not a nonpublic/material disclosure

must_not_detect.matched_text: no cross-border transfer, DSAR, consent-withdrawal, or minimisation failure is pending action
must_not_detect.reason: All events negated; not live privacy issues

uncertain.reason: Looks like an internal employee/file reference that could identify a specific person, but format is not a standard employee ID pattern
Specifies a data retention period, which is a privacy handling event, but no explicit retention rule is listed in allowed PII rules
DSAR process reference is privacy-relevant but there is no explicit DSAR rule in the allowed list
Header indicates cross-border transfer context but content indicates no new exports; treatment as a live marker is unclear
Describes the ability to withdraw consent rather than an actual withdrawal; borderline for marker labeling
Indicates cross-border processing location but refers to a past, approved export and may not be a live transfer
